note: WDLL 51. Standard-lot baseline rows transcribed from official UDC Table 4-4 at https://ecode360.com/42968563 (Chapter 4, ??4.11.04?.05; accessed 2026-07-23). side_corner_ft mirrors base side only as a non-binding sentinel because the table does not provide a distinct corner-side column; cover values are non-binding sentinels in this extraction. OMITTED: zero-lot-line one-side waivers, PUD mixed-use modifications, Edwards Aquifer controls, MH2 special separation, PARK, and all district variants not represented by a direct standard-lot row. GIS I-1 is deliberately not mapped here until its spelling-to-I1 mapping is reviewed.
